zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 我不想再跟风买那些网红产品了，太累

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 哈哈哈谢谢，我就想做自己

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 你上次当众怼那个甲方，真的太勇敢了

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 不是勇敢，是他说得真的有问题啊

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 行行行，反正你一直都这么real

en.speaker: A
en.text: I'm done following every trend, it's exhausting

en.speaker: B
en.text: Oh wow, that is so **based** of you!

en.speaker: A
en.text: Haha thanks, I just wanna be myself

en.speaker: B
en.text: Remember when you called out that client in the meeting? So brave

en.speaker: A
en.text: I wasn't being brave, he was just wrong

en.speaker: B
en.text: Fair, you're always staying true to yourself

definitions.en: Confidently expressing your opinion without caring what others think
definitions.zh: 自信表达观点，不在乎他人看法
做真实的自己，无需道歉

examples.en: He said he doesn't care about trends. That's so **based**.
examples.zh: 他说他不在乎潮流。这太真实了。

examples.en: You brought your own snacks to the movies? **Based** behavior.
examples.zh: 你带自己的零食去看电影？真实做自己。

examples.en: She stood up for her opinion even though everyone disagreed. **Based** take.
examples.zh: 她即使被所有人反对也坚持自己的观点。真实的立场。
